title: Converting a Date Format
scenario: Write a prompt that gets an LLM to convert a date in the format 'dd-mm-yyyy' to 'mm/dd/yyyy'. Provide a date and ensure the LLM generates the correct conversion.
constraints: Must use the specified input format

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated conversion meets the date conversion requirement.
Verifies the converted date is in the correct format.
